title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Phoenix Mills - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Phoenix Mills - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Phoenix Mills, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
